title: cortusina odoratissima
intro: Cortusina odoratissima, also known as the fragrant wood sorrel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Cortusa. The medicinal properties of Cortusina odoratissima include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming Cortusina odoratissima include its potential to alleviate symptoms of gastritis, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal disorders. Cortusina odoratissima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although its availability and use may vary depending on regional regulations.
